EMElevateMindStudio
Home Workspace Privacy

Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Service

ElevateMindStudio provides a social media operations workspace for brand source management, AI-assisted drafting, review, approval, scheduling, publishing support, and connector health checks.

Authorized use

You may use ElevateMindStudio only for accounts, brands, pages, channels, and workspaces that you own or are authorized to manage. You are responsible for following the rules of each connected platform.

Human review

Generated drafts, recommendations, and publishing plans should be reviewed by an authorized human before use. During setup, publishing features may run in dry-run mode or remain disabled until the required approvals are complete.

Connected services

Third-party services such as Buffer, YouTube, LinkedIn, Discord, Meta, and similar platforms are governed by their own terms. ElevateMindStudio does not control those services and cannot guarantee their approval, uptime, or API behavior.

Content responsibility

You are responsible for the accuracy, legality, and appropriateness of content created, approved, scheduled, or published through the workspace.

Availability

The platform may change during private beta. Features, integrations, limits, and publishing capabilities may be added, removed, paused, or modified as the product evolves.

Contact

Questions about these terms can be sent to support@elevatemindstudio.net.
